item.title: 香港家族办公室计划增加加密货币及私募市场投资
item.description: 根据香港当局委托的一份报告显示，许多香港家族办公室计划在未来三年内增加对私募股权和数字资产的投资。【原文：Many Hong Kong-based family offices are planning to add exposure to private equity and digital assets over the next three years, according to a report commissioned by local authorities.】

item.title: Polymarket Taps Palantir, TWG AI to Police Growing Sports Bets
item.description: 据知情人士透露，Polymarket正邀请包括Palantir Technologies Inc.在内的多家公司协助监管其体育合约。此举正值预测市场因内幕交易问题面临严密审查之际。【原文：Polymarket is enlisting firms including Palantir Technologies Inc. to help police its sports contracts, according to people familiar with the matter, a move that comes as prediction markets face intense scrutiny over insider trading.】

item.title: 特朗普减税政策恐因能源价格飙升而功亏一篑
item.description: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，2025年是为美国经济铺设餐桌的一年，而今年本应是"盛宴"之年。【原文：Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says 2025 was about setting the table for the US economy and this year was supposed to be the “banquet.”】

item.title: SpaceX值1.75万亿美元吗？马斯克巨额IPO的关键问题
item.description: 自苹果公司市值突破万亿美元大关的七年半以来，投资者已习惯于看到大型科技公司在公开市场获得高达13位数的估值。【原文：In the seven and a half years since Apple Inc.’s market capitalization broke through the $1 trillion mark, investors have become accustomed to seeing big tech companies command 13-digit valuations in public markets.】

item.title: 蒂凯豪与斯特林广场争夺瓶盖公司控制权
item.description: 据知情人士透露，私募股权公司斯特林广场资本合伙公司正与其贷款方蒂凯豪资本公司就一家意大利瓶盖制造商的控制权展开对峙。【原文：Private equity firm Stirling Square Capital Partners is facing off against its lender Tikehau Capital SCA over control of an Italian bottle-cap maker, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 能源科技公司Trilliant在杰富瑞协助下寻求出售
item.description: 知情人士透露，Trilliant Holdings Inc.的股东正考虑出售这家智能电网技术公司，此前该公司已收到潜在买家的询价。【原文：The owners of Trilliant Holdings Inc. are exploring a sale of the smart-grid technology company after attracting inquiries from potential buyers, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 法国核电站启动筹资9200万美元以完成设计
item.description: 由亿万富翁皮埃尔-爱德华·斯特林支持的法国核能初创企业Jimmy Energy SAS筹集了8000万欧元（约合9200万美元），用于完成其小型模块化反应堆的设计，并计划于2029年前启动建造工作。【原文：Jimmy Energy SAS, a French nuclear startup backed by billionaire Pierre-Edouard Sterin, raised €80 million ($92 million) to complete the design of its small modular reactor and start construction by 2029.】

item.title: 阿克曼寻求通过美国首次公开募股为佩辛格广场及其基金筹集100亿美元
item.description: 潘兴广场公司已提交首次公开募股申请，这笔交易将使亿万富翁比尔·阿克曼的对冲基金与一只新封闭式基金共同登陆美国交易所。【原文：Pershing Square Inc. filed for an initial public offering, in a deal that would see billionaire Bill Ackman’s hedge fund make its debut on a US exchange alongside a new closed-end fund.】

item.title: Lightspeed与Andreessen领投42亿美元，支持人工智能数据中心供应商
item.description: 人工智能基础设施初创企业Nexthop AI近日完成5亿美元融资，本轮融资由光速创投领投。此轮融资是人工智能能力建设领域投资热潮的一部分。【原文：Nexthop AI, an artificial intelligence infrastructure startup, has raised $500 million in a deal led by Lightspeed Venture Partners, part of a surge of investments in players building out AI capacity.】

item.title: 伊朗战争迫使日本汽车零部件供应商转向俄铝
item.description: 知情人士透露，中东地区冲突扩大导致铝贸易中断，迫使多家日本汽车零部件制造商与俄罗斯巨头联合公司（United Co. Rusal International PJSC）展开谈判。【原文：Disruptions in the aluminum trade caused by a widening conflict in the Middle East have pushed several Japanese auto-parts manufacturers into talks with Russian giant United Co. Rusal International PJSC, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 报告称刚果CMOC矿场污染损害当地健康
item.description: 据环保组织调查显示，全球最大钴生产商造成的空气污染似乎已损害刚果民主共和国当地社区居民的健康。【原文：Air pollution by the world’s biggest cobalt producer appears to have damaged the health of local communities in the Democratic Republic of Congo, according to an investigation by environmental groups.】

item.title: AT&T将在五年内斥资2500亿美元升级网络
item.description: 美国电话电报公司（AT&T Inc.）表示，未来五年将在美国投入超过2500亿美元建设基础设施，使公司年度投资额翻倍有余，以在与两大主要竞争对手争夺用户的战役中占据优势。【原文：AT&T Inc. said it will spend more than $250 billion in the next five years to build out its infrastructure in the U.S., setting up the company to more than double its annual investment in a battle for subscribers with its two largest competitors.】

item.title: 科桑收益受雷森拖累，注资缓解债务压力
item.description: 巴西综合企业科桑公司（Cosan SA）第四季度净亏损58亿雷亚尔（约合11亿美元），其旗下糖业和乙醇业务公司雷森公司（Raízen SA）表现疲软。【原文：Brazilian conglomerate Cosan SA reported a net loss of 5.8 billion reais ($1.1 billion) in the fourth quarter, amid weakness at sugar and ethanol business Raízen SA.】

item.title: 市场风险在伊朗之外的脆弱全球经济中隐隐浮现
item.description: 截至美国东部时间上午6:03的市场数据。市场数据可能因供应商协议而延迟。【原文：Market data as of 06:03 am EST. Market data may be delayed depending on provider agreements.】

item.title: Whoop推出299美元女性专属血液检测服务
item.description: Whoop公司——这家以生产无屏幕健身手环闻名的企业——正通过一项新型血液检测扩展其女性用户功能，该检测能更全面地呈现女性健康状况。【原文：Whoop Inc., the maker of popular screenless fitness bands, is expanding its features for women with a new blood test that offers a more comprehensive view of their health.】

item.title: 日本的投资目标包括人工智能、量子计算
item.description: 日本将数十种产品和技术列为投资优先目标，推进首相高市早苗的旗舰经济战略，旨在将公共和私人资本引导至17个战略领域。【原文：Japan identified dozens of products and technologies as priority targets for investment, advancing Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s flagship economic strategy to channel public and private capital into 17 strategic sectors.】

item.title: 印度内阁据称放宽限制中国投资的规则
item.description: 印度内阁放宽了对中国企业的投资限制，一名官员表示，此举标志着新德里对这个最大邻国兼地缘政治竞争对手的立场发生转变。【原文：India’s cabinet relaxed investment rules for Chinese firms, an official said, marking a shift in New Delhi’s stance toward its largest neighbor and geopolitical rival.】

item.title: 新兴市场获得喘息机会，特朗普暗示贸易战或将提前结束
item.description: 周二，随着美国总统特朗普暗示伊朗战争将迅速结束，新兴市场货币和股票出现反弹。油价因此走低，投资者纷纷回流买入遭抛售的资产。【原文：Emerging-market currencies and stocks rebounded Tuesday after President Donald Trump hinted at a speedy end to the Iran war, pushing oil prices lower and bringing investors back to buy beaten-down assets.】

item.title: 2025年南非经济增速创三年来新高
item.description: 2025年，在农业、贸易和金融行业产出强劲增长的推动下，南非经济实现了三年来最快增速。【原文：South Africa’s economy expanded at the fastest pace in three years in 2025, helped by stronger output in the agriculture, trade and finance industries.】

item.title: 七国集团能源部长将举行会议以稳定石油市场
item.description: 法国财政部长罗兰·莱斯库尔周二表示，七国集团能源部长将于周二在巴黎举行会议，继续就可能释放石油储备以稳定市场进行讨论。【原文：Group of Seven energy ministers will meet in Paris on Tuesday as they continue to debate a possible release of oil reserves to stabilize markets, French Finance Minister Roland Lescure said Tuesday.】

item.title: 亚洲燃油短缺迫使企业实行四天工作制并关闭学校
item.description: 随着中东战争限制能源供应，日益加剧的供应短缺正迫使亚洲各国政府加强对燃料使用的限制，并敦促民众避免恐慌性抢购。【原文：A widening supply crunch is forcing Asian governments to put more restrictions on fuel use and instruct citizens to avoid panic-buying, as the war in the Middle East limits the availability of energy.】

item.title: 美国告知盟友，进一步放松石油制裁将重点针对印度
item.description: 知情人士透露，美国已向欧洲盟友表明，若进一步放松对俄罗斯石油的制裁，主要将限于对印度的供应。【原文：The US has indicated to European allies that any further loosening of sanctions on Russian oil would be mostly limited to supplies to India, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 赤泽表示日本将支持国际能源署联合释放石油储备
item.description: 日本计划支持国际能源署成员国联合释放石油储备，因伊朗战争加剧了经济风险——能源进口价格上涨和全球需求疲软可能引发连锁反应。【原文：Japan plans to support a joint oil reserve release by members of the International Energy Agency as the war in Iran raises the risk of fallout for the economy via higher energy import prices and weaker global demand.】

item.title: GAM的马克姆质疑反弹行情能持续多久
item.description: GAM投资公司全球股票主管保罗·马克汉姆预计，尽管周二市场出现反弹行情，投资者仍将保持谨慎态度。他表示，当前的反弹态势"很难持续"。【原文：Paul Markham, head of global equities at GAM Investment, expects investors will remain cautious despite Tuesday’s relief rally, saying it’s “quite difficult to believe” the current bounce will be sustained.】

item.title: 甲骨文面临的最大盈利挑战在于市场对风险的过度关注
item.description: 在投资者对人工智能日益怀疑的浪潮中，甲骨文公司股价遭受的冲击堪称最重。而该公司即将公布的财报，恐怕也难以扭转这种市场情绪。【原文：Few stocks have been hit harder by investors’ rising skepticism around artificial intelligence than Oracle Corp. And there may be little the company’s upcoming earnings can do to change that sentiment.】

item.title: 海湾航空在伊朗导弹威胁下逐步增加航班
item.description: 尽管波斯湾国家持续在领空拦截来自伊朗的导弹和无人机，该地区航空公司正逐步增加航班数量。【原文：Airlines in the Persian Gulf are slowly starting to increase flights even as the countries continue to intercept missiles and drones from Iran in their skies.】

item.title: 瑞福森银行即将以5.5亿欧元收购BBVA罗马尼亚子公司
item.description: 知情人士称，瑞福森银行国际股份公司正接近达成收购BBVA旗下罗马尼亚Garanti银行的交易。【原文：Raiffeisen Bank International AG is closing in on a deal to buy BBVA’s Romanian Garanti unit, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 花旗银行为亚洲金融赞助商交易的繁忙期做准备
item.description: 随着交易活动增加以及企业寻求资本配置，花旗集团正扩大其负责金融赞助商的投资银行业务。【原文：Citigroup Inc. is bulking up its investment banking franchise that looks after financial sponsors as deal activity increases and firms seek to deploy capital.】

item.title: 欧洲央行穆勒称加息可能性更高 但呼吁保持冷静
item.description: 欧洲央行管理委员会成员马迪斯·穆勒表示，近期加息的可能性有所上升，但官员们不应对伊朗战争及其影响做出仓促反应。【原文：European Central Bank Governing Council member Madis Muller said the chances of an interest-rate hike have risen of late, but that officials shouldn’t react hastily to the war in Iran and its implications.】

item.title: 玻利维亚在特朗普佛罗里达峰会重启湮灭已久的美国同盟
item.description: 上周末，美国通过向罗德里戈·帕斯总统归还一件家族传家宝——其父（同样担任过总统）1990年赠予乔治·H·W·布什的金十字架——欢迎玻利维亚重返其势力范围。【原文：The US welcomed Bolivia back to its sphere of influence last weekend by returning a family heirloom to President Rodrigo Paz: the golden cross his father, who was also president, gave to George H.W. Bush in 1990.】
